title: biscutella longifolia subsp. guestphalica
intro:
Biscutella longifolia subsp. guestphalica, commonly known as Biscutella Guestphalica, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to Europe and is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include providing health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The therapeutic actions of Biscutella Guestphalica are attributed to its ability to modulate immune responses and exhibit cytotoxic properties, making it useful in treating various diseases. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
